cards.back: A collection of ordered pairs where each input corresponds to exactly one output
A function where each input corresponds to exactly one output, with no repeated inputs

cards.front: What is a one-to-one function also known as?
cards.back: A function that passes the horizontal line test

cards.front: What is the horizontal line test used to determine?
cards.back: If a horizontal line intersects the graph of a function at most once

cards.front: What is a key property of a one-to-one function?
cards.back: Each input has a unique output
